text:
# Introduction to Telegram Bots: Video Overview

In this section, we provide an overview of Telegram bots and their functionalities.

Telegram bots are special accounts that automate tasks and respond to user commands without needing a phone number. They operate through the Telegram Bot API, enabling seamless interaction.

### Key Features:
- Automate tasks
- Provide information
- Enhance user interaction

Common use cases include customer support, entertainment, and information dissemination.

For further learning, check these references:
- [Python Official Tutorial](https://docs.python.org/3/tutorial/)
- [Python Standard Library](https://docs.python.org/3/library/)
- [MDN Web Docs](https://developer.mozilla.org/)
- [Wikipedia Overview](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:Search?search=Telegram%20Mini%20Bots%20Development%20for%20Web%20Developers%20Introduction%20to%20Telegram%20Bots%20and%20Python%20Basics%20Introduction%20to%20Telegram%20Bots%3A%20Video%20Overview)
